name: Jira Draft
purpose: Input a fuzzy business request, inspect memory and impact, review eval feedback, answer open questions, and generate a Jira proposal.
heading: Jira Draft
visibleText: Jira draft agentJira Draft Start with a rough business request. DREAM retrieves memory, maps engineering impact, asks unresolved questions, and drafts a Jira proposal for human review. Draft onlyhuman approval requiredBusiness RequestEnter the fuzzy requirement exactly as a stakeholder would describe it.InputRough business request Advanced settings Generate Jira Proposal Generated output will appear here. After generation, the page will show memory docs used, affected file count, editable open questions, Jira proposal, and Eval Agent judgment.

name: PR Review
purpose: Input Jira context and PR diff, inspect memory/code impact and eval feedback, then generate a PR review summary.
heading: PR Review
visibleText: Pull request review aidPR Review Paste a diff and Jira context. DREAM finds related memory, summarizes code impact, and produces a review aid for the human PR reviewer. No PR postingreview aid onlyReview InputKeep the reviewer focused on the diff and the business intent.InputJira contextPR diff Advanced settings Generate PR Review Generated PR review will appear here. After generation, the page will show changed files, related code memory, source docs, risk, Eval Agent judgment, and reviewer-facing output.
